name: Chie Satonaka
description: "...I think this "power" of mine is what I wanted all along. The power to protect everyone... I understand now. I'm not supposed to use it to become more self-reliant... I'm supposed to use this power to protect people... Yukiko, my friends, my family, this town.. and you." - Chie Satonaka, Persona 4
creator: Samu_anzani
